title: RMTBench
description: Hidden judged proxy for the official RMTBench full-dialogue role-play protocol; kept out of the runnable lane until gated data alignment is complete.
baseline_summary: A tiny hidden proxy slice with judged role-play scoring while the official full-dialogue implementation remains blocked on gated data.

objective_spec.summary_template: Higher RMTBench score is better across the hidden judged proxy while the official gated protocol remains unavailable locally.

prompt_context: Edit editable.py only. The entry symbol solve(question: dict) must return the next assistant turn for the hidden RMTBench proxy item. If eval_model is provided, the proxy judges user-goal alignment, role consistency, and response quality.
